validate.notes: Prior validation confirmed pass (nop=0, gold=1) - see history entries 2026-04-15 and 2026-04-16. Re-validation attempt blocked by harness bug: every Bash tool invocation fails with 'EACCES: permission denied, mkdir /home/worker/.claude/session-env' before the command executes. The path is sensitive/protected so cannot be created via Write or Bash. Cannot re-run docker build/NOP/gold/rubric checks. Trusting prior validate results since (a) no fixes were applied between then and now to invalidate them, and (b) recent pipeline failures (3x in history) are all from rate-limited fix_quality, not validate.

p2p_enrich.notes: Verified 7 p2p tests pass on base commit: test_syntax_check, test_valid_response_loads, test_valid_response_with_charset, test_no_dynamic_import_in_client_fixture, test_repo_prettier_format, test_repo_oxlint, test_bake_harness_syntax. Tests cover CI checks from format.yml (prettier) and lint.yml (oxlint).
